name_cn:
Genuine quality
Triomphe Shoulder Bag
Transforming the Triomphe backpack into a shoulder bag style! More slender than previous models. Definitely a high-visibility piece. Calfskin with sheepskin lining, featuring the iconic Triomphe logo lock. Adjustable shoulder strap, 194142
Size: 21-11-4cm
